Video.summary: ōThe Century Raceö: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?
Video.title: The Century Race

Video.summary: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.
Video.title: Doubling Down

Video.summary: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of WhatÆs in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase ōRide a Winnerö are high on this father and sonÆs list of ōmust havesö. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timerÆs cars, bikes, and automobiles.
Video.title: Time is Not On Their Side

Image.alt: Time is Not On Their Side
Time is Not On Their Side
Time is Not On Their Side

Video.summary: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an ōOrphan Bikeö show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.
Video.title: Orphan Bikes

Video.summary: ōA Motorcycle Crime Storyö: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.
Video.title: Motorcycle Crime Story

Video.summary: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.
Video.title: Wounded Warrior Project

Video.summary: ō12hrs. & Runningö: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.
Video.title: 12 Hours and Running

Video.summary: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the worldÆs most sought after works specials.
Video.title: Hidden Hillclimbers

Video.summary: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.
Video.title: Peashooter

Video.summary: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.
Video.title: Davenport Swap

Video.summary: ōYes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harleyö: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.
Video.title: 100 Year Old Harley

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.
Video.title: Twin City Turbos

Video.summary: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.
Video.title: 470MPH with Custom King George Poteet

Video.summary: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.
Video.title: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Image.alt: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Video.summary: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.
Video.title: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Image.alt: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Video.summary: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.
Video.title: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions

Image.alt: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions

Video.summary: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.
Video.title: Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl

Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl

Video.summary: Mecum Auction's push for a $15,000,000 sale.
Video.title: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection

Image.alt: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection

Video.summary: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!
Video.title: Turn of the Century Cars

Video.summary: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.
Video.title: Hot Wheel's & an Urban Outlaw

Video.summary: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.
Video.title: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Image.alt: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Video.summary: In the early 1900s, race tracks built of wood sprang up across the country drawing crowds of 50,000 and more. Ray and Xtreme sports superstar Travis Pastrana break down the Battle on the Boards.
Video.title: BOARD TRACK BATTLES

Video.summary: Ray finds an old T-Bucket that made a 133 mph pass at the Bonneville Salt Flats in 1951. The team brings the Woody Lee T back to life and attempts to match its original speed.
Video.title: MODEL T

Video.summary: Doubling down for cars and coffee.
Video.title: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder

Image.alt: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder

Video.summary: British Invasion through the decades.
Video.title: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Image.alt: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Video.summary: Due diligence on custom builds and their quirky builders.
Video.title: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Image.alt: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Video.summary: The Concourse d'lemons celebrates the oddball, mundane, & truly awful of the automotive world.
Video.title: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Image.alt: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Video.summary: Rickey, Bryan and Adam explore all the cars that should never have been built at Concourse d'lemons.
Video.title: Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure

Image.alt: Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure

Video.summary: One of a kind cars at Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane.
Video.title: Super Cars at Course d'Elegance

Video.summary: Nick Rutter walks you through step-by-step on how to detail the exterior as well as the interior of an electric vehicle, including vegan leather cleaning and conditioning.
Video.title: Detailing an Electric Vehicle

Video.summary: Nick Rutter walks you through the best tools, chemicals, and accessories for performing a myriad of detailing tasks, including cleaning buffing pads, selecting the best tire shine, as well as quick interior maintenance.
Video.title: Detailing Tips & Techniques

Video.summary: When you buy a new Dodge Ram Truck there are certain things youÆll want to do to get it ready to tow your toys.
Video.title: Dodge Ram Tow Truck

Video.summary: Like trucks, UTVs can be customized beyond our imaginations. But there are also some common problems that need to be fixed.
Video.title: UTV Fix

Video.summary: They guys diagnose and a repair a crank, no start problem on a Ford Powerstroke.
Video.title: Diesel No Start

Video.summary: When you start with a frame from a C-10 truck there is only one way for this project to goģ.down. WeÆll give the C-10 frame a 2-inch drop and bolt on a ton of cool new parts.
Video.title: C-10 Frame Off Resto

Video.summary: What does it take to go from 2-wheel drive to 4-wheel drive? A new transfer case, front axle and transmission parts to name a few. Your not going to want miss this 4 wheel drive conversion today on Truck U.
Video.title: 4 WD Conversion

Video.summary: Today on Truck U weÆll show you what it takes to pick out the right donor truck for your next project and give you an inside look at some of the problems areas inside the engine.
Video.title: Donor Truck

Video.summary: How do you get a truck to sell faster at a dealership? Bring it to Truck U and let them have their way with it. See if Matt and Bruno can flip this Ford on Truck U.
Video.title: Flip This Ford

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno customize a truck for a local alligator hunter.
Video.title: Alligator Hunter

Video.summary: On the beaches of Wildwood, NJ, an iconic vintage race, The Race of Gentleman, takes place annually: period cars, period dress, pure authenticity. Ray puts a car in the race with a very special driver, who turns out not to be a Gentleman.
Video.title: ROAR AT THE SHORE

Video.summary: Scott Borchetta, CEO and Founder of Big Machine Label Group, and his brother, Mark, love racing just as much as anyone. From Indy to Nashville, Ray finds he has a lot in common with the Borchetta brothers. This celebrity-filled episode features musicians Tim McGraw, Cassadee Pope and IndyCar driver Josef Newgarden.
Video.title: CARS AND MUSIC STARS

Video.summary: In 1964, the United States sent a star-studded race team to England to educate them on drag racing. On that team was Bob Keith and his Dos Palmas car. After being lost for over 40 years, Ray uncovers car and puts together a plan to reunite the two once more. The restoration of the car takes an emotional turn with the loss of a friend.
Video.title: DRAGSTER DIPLOMACY

Video.summary: Blues legend Joe Bonamassa is looking for a surprise gift for his parents. With his love of cars and guitars, Joe has to get Ray and Mr. H involved. From Mopar muscle to Mr. HÆs man cave to a concert performance from Joe, this episode has a lot of Drive.
Video.title: SMOKIN JOE

Video.summary: Jeff and Kristen have a run in with the law, well sort of.
Video.title: Heated Debates

Video.summary: This time out, Jeff and Kristen have to rescue some people just wanting to have a nice camping experience.
Video.title: Camping Nightmares

Video.summary: A mailman needs rescued, brakes go out on a vehicle and funny phone calls on this episode!
Video.title: Neither Snow nor brakes nor bad phone calls

Image.alt: Neither Snow nor brakes nor bad phone calls
Neither Snow nor brakes nor bad phone calls
Neither Snow nor brakes nor bad phone calls

Video.summary: Jeff and Kristen get into a delicate mix of snappy people and trapped work vehicles.
Video.title: Towpourri

Video.summary: Follow Jeff and Kristen Patton in the wild adventures of their towing service in the scenic and sometimes dangerous Pigeon Forge TN. This episode Jeff helps a semi driver get out of a tight turn, move a sly cone manipulator, and get a couple people off a ledge. All in a days work!
Video.title: Welcome to Gatlinburg

Video.summary: Jeff and Kristen Patton are back. This episode takes the crew to capture a stolen car and rescue a ditched car. All in a days work!
Video.title: Towventure!
